name: Newburg Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Add flour and stir to form a roux.
3. Slowly whisk in the Seafood Redi-Base until blended.
4. Add Old Bay Seasoning, paprika, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and add cream and sherry.
7. Serve. Excellent with seafood and chicken dishes. Makes 2 cups.
